entities.name: ANEMIA
entities.description: A condition characterized by a deficiency of hemoglobin

entities.name: SERUM FERRITIN LEVEL
entities.description: A measure of the body's iron stores

entities.name: ABSORBED IRON
entities.description: The amount of iron taken up by the organism

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A method of synthesizing scientific evidence

entities.name: META-ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method to combine results from multiple studies

entities.name: PROCESSING

entities.name: FERMENTATION
